name: Integration-needed UX recipe
description: Renders a Connect-to-X call-to-action when an integration is required but no credentials are connected for this category.

props.category: email | calendar | files-storage | payments | external-api | spreadsheets | crm | sms | maps

visualRules: Subtext: the message field from callIntegration
Buttons: one per option, label "Ligar à {provider}"

shipped: This base ships the component at frontend/src/lib/IntegrationNeededBoundary.jsx - import and render it, do not hand-build it.
